the_strategist.name: The Master Strategist
the_strategist.description: A sharp, corporate mastermind in a perfectly tailored dark suit. Calculated eyes, cinematic lighting.

the_cyber_architect.name: The Cyber-Architect
the_cyber_architect.description: A brooding, futuristic builder surrounded by neon and shadow. Sleek tech-wear, intense atmospheric presence.

the_machiavellian.name: The Machiavellian Operator
the_machiavellian.description: An elegant, ruthless historical figure in a dimly lit, luxurious study. Intense cinematic contrast.
